package.name: motoman_gp200r_support

description.p: ROS-Industrial support for the Motoman GP200r (and variants).
This package contains configuration data, 3D models and launch files for Motoman GP200r series of manipulators.

ul.li: GP200R - Not equipped with spot welding harness - YR-1-06VR200-A00 (STANDARD SPECIFICATION)

description.p: Joint limits and maximum joint velocities are based on the information found in MOTOMAN-GP165R,GP200R INSTRUCTIONS (HW1484396) version 186044-1CD, rev 4. All urdfs are based on the default motion and joint velocity limits, unless noted otherwise.

This model comes in two versions: equipped with spot welding harness and not equipped with spot welding harness. The version with the spot welding harness has reduced motion range to account for restrictions from extra hardware and cables routed outside of the robot. It also has a reduced payload of 185 kg and lower allowable moment and inertia for the wrist joints. Please refer to the manual for further details.
This support package only has the version without a spot welding harness
Before using any of the configuration files and / or meshes included in this package, be sure to check they are correct for the particular robot model and configuration you intend to use them with.

package.author: Dylan Rolleigh
Akash Jinandra (Bastian Solutions)
package.maintainer: G.A. vd. Hoorn (TU Delft Robotics Institute)
